summary: Extended PR-bot from TypeScript-only to all 4 platforms (TypeScript, iOS, Android, Flutter).

changes.description: Added PLATFORM_CONFIG dict mapping all 4 platforms to their extractor, surface file, branch tag, and code fence language. Rewrote _flat_refs to handle both TS format (namespaces+root_exports) and iOS/Android/Flutter types-dict format including nested_types (list or dict), Android interfaces, Flutter mixins/extensions (list or dict). Fixed nested_types handling: iOS emits a list not a dict. Updated get_sdk_sha, get_sdk_commit_msg, get_baseline_sha, find_existing_bot_pr to accept platform parameter and filter by platform-specific branch pattern. Removed duplicate find_existing_bot_pr call in main(). Updated run_extractor_to_temp and main to be platform-parameterized.

Converted single TS job to 4-platform matrix strategy (fail-fast: false). Added workflow_dispatch platform input (choice: blank/typescript/ios/android/flutter). Added SDK checkout steps for all 4 SDK repos using SDK_READONLY_PAT secret. Updated concurrency group to be per-platform. Updated SP_SDKS_ROOT to $GITHUB_WORKSPACE/..

Full rewrite from TypeScript-only doc to all-4-platform doc. Added platform table, required secrets section (SDK_READONLY_PAT), per-platform disable instructions, updated local dry-run section with all 4 SDK sibling layout.
